reviews.comment:
Amplio mi calificación, la señorita que nos atendió no tuvo una buena contestación al decirle que las facturas estaban un poco crudas. Nos tomamos el café solo y me llevé las facturas que seguían igual. Me queja es por la mala atención de la señorita.

(Translated by Google)
I'm increasing my rating because the young woman who served us didn't respond well when we told her the pastries were a little undercooked. We just had our coffee and I took the pastries, which were still the same. My complaint is about the young woman's poor service.

reviewReply.comment: Buenos días agradecemos amplíe su calificación
